summary: Bug fix verified: Duplicate comparison modal now correctly displays batch names ('Hasta 28-02-26') instead of 'Desconocido'. Backend API /api/questions/by-id returns batch_name and batch_date correctly. Frontend handleViewDuplicate function now fetches complete batch info for both questions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for duplicate comparison modal verified. The endpoint /api/questions/by-id/{id} now returns batch_name and batch_date. The frontend Editor.jsx handleViewDuplicate function fetches batch info for both new and original questions via this endpoint. The DuplicatesModal component uses formatBatchInfo to display the batch names correctly.
verified_features: Clicking 'Duplicado - Click para comparar' badge opens modal with correct batch names
Modal shows 'PREGUNTA A - Hasta 28-02-26' and 'PREGUNTA B - Hasta 28-02-26' instead of 'Desconocido'
POST /api/questions/check-duplicates/{batch_id} returns batch info for historical duplicates
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause: The handleViewDuplicate function was not populating batch_name and batch_date in the new_question object when constructing the duplicate comparison. Fix: Now the function makes two API calls to /api/questions/by-id for both the new question and the original question, and passes the batch info (batch_name, batch_date, batch_id) to the modal.
